patch.value: Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: the extension governance policy shape/default list is hand-maintained in multiple places. DEFAULT_SETTINGS embeds extensions.policy in src/core/shared/constants.ts:265, DEFAULT_EXTENSION_POLICY repeats the same shape in src/core/extensions/loader.ts:188, and test fixtures retype the full object in tests/unit/extension-loader.spec.ts:276 plus other extension-loader cases. The repeated allowed/blocked extension/capability/surface/command/action/service arrays make future policy fields easy to add in one place and miss elsewhere. Existing open item pm-5k2w mentions default-safety/doc-validator drift broadly, but not this concrete code/test duplication; pm-why9 only covers status/workflow defaults, not extension policy defaults. Fix by exporting/reusing one default factory or normalizer fixture for production code and tests.

Extension policy defaults come from one exported source or factory; loader/settings normalization and tests consume that source instead of retyping the full policy object; adding a policy key requires one production default update and focused tests; extension-loader/settings tests and pnpm build pass.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: searched tracker for extension policy defaults and allow/block lists. Only broad pm-5k2w and closed extension-system items appeared; no open specific item tracks this duplication. rg confirmed repeated full policy shapes in constants, loader, and extension-loader fixtures.
